title: pinus tabuliformis var. densata
intro: Pinus tabuliformis var. densata, also known as Chinese Pi, is a variety of the Pinus tabuliformis plant, which is native to China. This evergreen tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's bark and leaves are rich in compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits like improved cardiovascular health and reduced risk of certain cancers. Chinese Pi is often prepared as a tea, or in the form of capsules or tablets, and is also used in traditional remedies such as infusions and decoctions.
